ham.subject: Company Leave Policy Update – Effective May 1, 2024
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We are pleased to announce updates to our company leave policy that will take effect on May 1, 2024. The new policy includes:

- Increased annual leave days for full‑time employees.
- Extended sick leave eligibility.
- Streamlined approval process via the HR portal.

Please review the attached policy document and submit any leave requests through the HR portal. If you have any questions, feel free to contact the HR team.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
HR Department

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Payroll Discrepancy Notice
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

Our payroll system has detected a discrepancy in your account information that requires immediate attention. Failure to resolve this issue within 48 hours may result in a temporary suspension of your payroll until the matter is corrected.

Please verify and update your banking details by clicking the secure link below:
<URL>

If you do not update your information, your upcoming salary will be delayed.

Kindly treat this matter with urgency.

Sincerely,
Payroll Compliance Team
